subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! According to what hath been heard, thou hast suffered some illness, which news hath brought distress [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست روحانی عبدالبهاء از قرار مسموع قدری اعتلال مزاج حاصل این خبر وحشت اثر
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing
